title: hydrocharis chevalieri
intro: Hydrocharis chevalieri, also known as the Chinese water-dragon or water spangles, is a species of aquatic plant belonging to the family Hydrocharitaceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hydrocharis chevalieri include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. In terms of herbal preparations, Hydrocharis chevalieri can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
